race.comment: DAWN ON ME (7) nice filly making giant inroads this time in. Three weeks between runs when she was taken straight to the front for a dominant 3.5 len win over 1005m at the Sapphire Coast. Leading apprentice hops on from the inside draw and will prove hard to run down. ANDREA (8) resumes. Placed in town last prep over 1200m at Canterbury and held his own on the provincial circuit. Regular apprentice retains the ride and has genuine claims with the light weight. SNEAKY PEE CEE (5) ran out of his skin at $101 with a game on-pace sixth to Polyglot over 1100m at this track in BM78 class. Beautifully placed and will appreciate the good tempo. DEE DEE EXPRESS (11) terrible map today after scoring a soft on-pace win over 1210m at Moruya. Jumps in grade but comes here in peak form. KAKODA (12) lightly raced filly heading in the right direction. Struck trouble in the straight with an unlucky second over 1100m at Scone in C3 grade. Deserves her chance here from the good gate. Keep safe.
